kvantum port

Hello,

I took the idea of the port logic from the latest changes of qtcurve.

Kvantum is a theme engine for Qt4/Qt5. 

Homepage: https://github.com/tsujan/Kvantum
Themes: http://kde-look.org/content/search.php?xsortmode=new&search=1&type=0&user=&text=kvantum&sort=0&scorefilter=0&license=99&page=0
